mnemonics.title: BFS Layers
mnemonics.content: BFS Like Onion Layers: Processes nodes layer by layer (queue-based)

mnemonics.title: Prim vs Kruskal
mnemonics.content: Prim Picks Proximity (node-centric), Kruskal Keeps Kind Edges (edge-sorted)

visualTips.visualization: Imagine exploring maze: mark walls (visited), backtrack when stuck

analogies.analogy: Like GPS navigation finding quickest route considering traffic (weights)
